utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided: physical_health plan and cost, mental_health plan and cost, plus total_cost. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided: home_contents plan and cost. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Provided: travel_insurance plan and cost. Fully specified.
- additional_services: any enhancement services with costs. Provided: premium_insurance_membership with plan and cost. Fully specified.
- total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided: monthly_cost and a breakdown formula; no annual figure, but it does give a complete monthly breakdown which satisfies 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown' as at least one is complete. Thus considered specified.
Therefore, 5/5 items are included and specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four named items: EliteCare Premium Plan (physical health), PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental health), EliteHome Premium Coverage (home contents), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel), and Premium Insurance Membership (general service). I matched each of these to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings and extracted their exact rating numbers.
